nodes.label: PyQt6 Migration Rationale
nodes.rationale: Replaced tkinter with PyQt6 for better widgets, native drag-and-drop support, proper layout resizing, and the ability to run merge in a background QThread with thread-safe UI updates via Qt signals — eliminating the need for tkinter's root.after() polling pattern.

nodes.label: SmartNamer Auto-naming Rationale
nodes.rationale: Analyzes input filenames to suggest a merged output name with number range (e.g. A 1-3.cbz) by extracting the last numeric group from each stem, finding the longest common prefix, and building a min-max range. Falls back to _Merged suffix when no numbers found.

nodes.label: Auto-clear After Merge Rationale
nodes.rationale: After a successful merge the file list, log, and progress bar reset automatically so the user can start a new merge immediately without manual cleanup.

nodes.label: add_files Bug Fix Rationale
nodes.rationale: Original code used side-effect trick (not list.append(f)) that made the added count always 0 and left dead duplicate-checking code. Fixed with a single clean loop tracking actual count.

nodes.label: Single-file Architecture Rationale
nodes.rationale: All classes kept in a single cbz_merger.py for simplicity of distribution — can be run from source or compiled to a standalone .exe with PyInstaller --onefile.

nodes.label: Light/Dark Theme Feature
nodes.rationale: QSS stylesheets toggled at runtime and persisted via QSettings. Light is default. Toggle button (moon/sun) in header.
